div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Switzerland (Wilson)
div.p: 74. Your despatch from Geneva, April 20, 1929. Please proceed to Geneva at your early convenience and sign the convention and protocol for the suppression of counterfeiting currency. Do not sign the final act or optional protocol. Telegraph date of signature.
For your information, in connection with Article 23, this Government proposes that, before the convention is ratified, certain changes in its legislation shall be made.
